pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to hear him making coffee or hearing his keys on the counter... but there's nothing. it's just this heavy, empty silence that follows me everywhere. i don't even know why i'm bothering to get out of bed anymore. what's the point of all this just being alone?

pool.baseline: it's just hard to care about anything lately. like, i was looking at the stars tonight and just thinking... everything we do, every single struggle, every bit of pain, it's all just going to be erased. the universe is so massive and indifferent, and eventually it all just goes dark anyway. it feels like we're just fighting for nothing. does any of this actually matter?

pool.baseline: i honestly dont even know what to do anymore. everything i worked for these last 4 years... the lab results, the funding, the dissertation... it just feels like it's all gone. i feel like i've wasted my entire life on a version of myself that doesn't even exist anymore. i'm just so tired. like, deep in my bones, exhausted. i don't see the point in waking up tomorrow just to fail again.

pool.baseline: the candles are all burned down to nothing... and so am i. he's gone, and the silence in this house is heavier than the stone of the abbey. it feels so much more natural to just... stop. to let the darkness take me rather than face another dawn without him. it would be so quiet, wouldn't it? just fading away like mist.

pool.baseline: it's been so long since i've actually spoken to anyone in person. sometimes i'm sitting in this cafe just watching people walk by and it hits me that i could just... not be here anymore, and the world wouldn't even stutter. like my whole life is just a zero-sum game. i'm just taking up space that doesn't even matter.
